body: Merged the codes “belonging” and “rootedness”. After re-reading P03 and P05 they were doing the same analytic work; kept “belonging” as the parent code and noted the two sub-shades underneath it.

As someone who has never gardened, I may be over-reading “community” into what are, for some participants, simply practical arrangements about water and tools. Watch for this when coding the Riverside fieldnotes — let the participants’ own words lead.
